Name: Eastman Sockets Set 24 Pcs 1 2 Inch Sq Drive Bmc Pack Chrome Vanadium Steel Wrench 6Pt Metal Box Socket Spanners
Description: High-Quality Material: Made from durable chrome vanadium steel for enhanced strength and long-lasting performance. Blow Molded Case: Packed in a sturdy blow molded case for easy organization, storage, and transportation. Quick Release Ratchet: Equipped with a round ratchet handle featuring a quick release mechanism for fast and efficient socket changes. Spark Plug Socket
